description: Gold layer configuration for revenue gap analysis

gold_tables.sql_script: SELECT ch."EncounterICN" as revenueGapID, DATE_PART('year', CURRENT_DATE) * 100 + DATE_PART('month', CURRENT_DATE) as yearMonth, ch."HICNumber" as planMemberID, ch."BillingProviderNPI" as billingProviderID, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(cl."ServiceLineChargeAmount" AS DECIMAL)), 0) as totalBilledAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(cl."ServiceLineUnitCount" AS DECIMAL)), 0) as totalUnits, COUNT(cl."ClaimLineNumber") as lineCount, ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode" as primaryDiagnosis, CASE WHEN ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode" LIKE 'E11%' THEN 'Diabetes' WHEN ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode" LIKE 'I25%' THEN 'Heart Disease' ELSE 'Other' END as conditionCategory, 'Pending Review' as gapStatus, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as createdDateTime FROM claim_headers ch LEFT JOIN claim_lines cl ON ch."EncounterICN" = cl."ClaimLineEncounterICN" WHERE ch."RecordType" = 'C' GROUP BY ch."EncounterICN", ch."HICNumber", ch."BillingProviderNPI", ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode"
